creator: mam@werries.de
text:
Fetching metadata signature for 8.1-RELEASE from update4.FreeBSD.org... done.

Fetching files from 8.0-RELEASE for merging... done.
Preparing to download files... done.
Fetching 5 patches... done.
Applying patches... done.
Fetching 205 files... gunzip: unknown compression format
53babe0d2db52413ae0ec09331ecb4f63237ad6114a5f4f85ffa40a6068b90ed has incorrect hash.

How-To-Repeat: freebsd-update -r 8.1-RELASE upgrade

it fetches about 16000 files, starts to fetch more patches and then breaks at a random number with above message. the 53babe... is always the same
